dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: I CAN'T EVEN PULL IT OUT.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: A BALL THAT CAN WITHSTAND THE BLACK MARCH?! EVEN I HAVEN'T SEEN SUCH A THING!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: WHAT'S WITH THAT BALL?!

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: WELL, MAYBE IT'S A REALLY WELL-MADE BALL.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: REALLY WELL-MADE?! ARE YOU JOKING?!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: SO YOU INTENDED TO MAKE HIM FAIL THE TEST, DIDN'T YOU?! YOU DAMN RABBIT! STOP THE TEST NOW!

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: SORRY, I CAN'T. ONCE THE TEST IS STARTED, IT WILL ONLY END WHEN HE GIVES UP.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: DAMN IT! NICE TRY!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: GIVE UP! NOW!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: YOU CAN NEVER PASS THIS TEST!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: BURST ALREADY!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: HEY! STOP!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: I SAID BURST!

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: PLEASE!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: DAMN THAT BASTARD!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: IT CAME TOO!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: DAMN IT! I CAN'T WAIT ANYMORE! I NEED TO GO IN AND FORCIBLY DRAG HIM OUT!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: EVAN! HELP ME!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: MY LADY, PLEASE WAIT.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: EVAN?! THERE IS SOMETHING ELSE HE CAN DO, WITH THE BLACK MARCH, RIGHT?

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: WHAT?

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: EVAN, DO YOU MEAN...

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: HEY! BOY! THE BLACK MARCH! AND TALK TO HER! ASK HER FOR HELP!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: EVAN?!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: ASK HER TO "IGNITE" HER POWER!

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: HUH? TALK TO THE BLACK MARCH? WHAT DO YOU MEAN?

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: JUST DO IT! YOU'VE GOT NO TIME! DO YOU WANNA DIE?

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: AH, OK! I GOT IT!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: EVAN, ARE YOU NUTS?! BLACK MARCH HAS NEVER EVEN IGNITED HER POWER FOR ME, MY LADY.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: NO, MY LADY. SO THERE'S NO WAY SHE WOULD LEND HER POWER TO A ROOKIE LIKE HIM.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: SHE WILL.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: WHAT? ARE YOU SURE? YOU...

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: I REMEMBER YOU SAID IT'S HARD FOR YOU TO HANDLE THE BLACK MARCH BECAUSE SHE'S A TOMBOY WHO DOES AS SHE PLEASES, RIGHT?

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: RIGHT.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: YOU SAID IT'S HARD TO TALK TO HER, PERIOD. LET ALONE IGNITING HER.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: BUT IT MIGHT WORK NOW.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: WHAT KIND OF NONSENSE IS THAT?

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: YEAH, AS A GUIDE, I HAVE A FEELING HE CAN.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: YOU CAN WALK THIS PATH TOO, CAN'T YOU? I DON'T KNOW EXACTLY WHAT IT IS, BUT THERE IS SOMETHING IN YOU THAT ATTRACTS PEOPLE.

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: PLEASE HELP ME MAKE IT TO THE TOWER.

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: PLEASE HELP! PLEASE!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: DAMN! IT'S TOO MUCH FOR HIM! I'LL GO AND GET HIM OUT!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: IT'S WORKING!

dialogue.speaker: Black March
dialogue.line: DO YOU... WANT TO GO UP THAT BADLY? ARE YOU THAT DESPERATE... TO GO UP THE TOWER? YOU... YOU ARE...

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: BLACK MARCH?

dialogue.speaker: Black March
dialogue.line: PRECIOUS GOLD AND JEWELS, MAGICAL FRUITS, HEAVENLY BEAUTIES, AND THE TASTE OF POWER AND GLORY. SWEETEST ABOVE ALL. WHAT IS IT THAT DRIVES YOU UPWARD AMONGST ALL THESE?

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: NO, I... I JUST WANT RACHEL.

dialogue.speaker: Black March
dialogue.line: RACHEL? WHAT IS THAT? IS IT THE NAME OF A JEWEL? OR A POSITION OF POWER? OR THE NAME OF THE MOST BEAUTIFUL WOMAN IN THIS TOWER?

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: NO, RACHEL'S MY FRIEND. I USED TO SPEND MY TIME WITH HER. SHE'S NOT AS MARVELOUS AS JEWELS AND SHE'S NOT THE MOST BEAUTIFUL GIRL IN THE WORLD. SHE'S A TOMBOY WHO MAKES JOKES AND SOMETIMES SHE EVEN LIES TO ME. BUT SHE'S THE MOST PRECIOUS PERSON IN MY LIFE. IF I CAN JUST FIND HER, I DON'T NEED TO GO UP THE TOWER.

dialogue.speaker: Black March
dialogue.line: YOU'RE BORING. BUT IT'S NOT THAT I DON'T LIKE THAT TYPE OF GUY. FIRST OF ALL, YOU'RE MY TYPE.

dialogue.speaker: Black March
dialogue.line: OK, I'LL GIVE YOU A HAND, JUST THIS ONE TIME.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: WHAT'S THIS POWER?!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: IS THAT... THE IGNITION?!

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: I KNEW IT!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: WHAT? REALLY? DID SHE REALLY LEND HIM HER POWER? BUT SHE'S NEVER IGNITED FOR ME!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: COULD THAT...

dialogue.speaker: Black March
dialogue.line: GET LOST, GIRLS! THIS GUY IS MINE!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: SO IT WAS SEXISM, WASN'T IT?! IT WAS SEXISM! YOU'RE STILL YOUNG! IT'S A GOOD THING AFTER ALL.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: SO YOU, HA HA, IGNITED JUST BECAUSE YOU WERE IN THE HANDS OF A CUTE BOY? HUH?

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: WELL, I WAS RIGHT ABOUT WHY I DIDN'T GET LADY YURI ALONG WITH BLACK MARCH.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: BUT DOESN'T THAT LOOK A BIT DANGEROUS?

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: YOU'RE RIGHT. THE BALL ISN'T SUPPOSED TO BURST LIKE THAT.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: WHAT?! YOU JERK! HEADON, WHAT HAVE YOU DONE TO THE BALL?!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: HEY! GET OUT OF THERE RIGHT NOW! NEW BOY!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: HEY! NEW BOY!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: DAMN IT!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: NEW BOY!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: HEY! NO!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: HE DISAPPEARED! HEY! YOU DAMN RABBIT! WHAT DID YOU DO TO THAT BALL?!

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: NOTHING. I JUST GRANTED HIS WISH. THE BOY WENT UP.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: HEADON, WHAT'S REALLY ON YOUR MIND? I ONLY TEST THOSE WHO ENTER THE TOWER. I JUST PREPARE A TEST THAT IS EQUIVALENT TO THE VALUE OF THEIR WISH. THAT IS THE FATE OF THE TOWER ADMINISTRATOR. SHOULDN'T YOU FOLLOW AFTER HIM, PRINCESS YURI?

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: BAM TOOK THE BLACK MARCH WITH HIM.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: YOU... YOU'VE GOT A BAD SENSE OF HUMOR. LET'S GO, EVAN! LET'S FIND HIM!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: AHH! YES, MY LADY!

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: DID YOU SEE? THE BOY WENT UP.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: WHAT WILL YOU DO NOW, MISS?

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: DAMN THAT RABBIT! ONE DAY I'LL PULL HIS EARS OFF! HOW WILL I FIND THAT BOY AGAIN?! SO ANNOYING. SHOULD I EVEN LOOK FOR THE BLACK MARCH? CAN'T BELIEVE SHE FELL IN LOVE WITH A STRANGER AND RAN AWAY.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: WHAT ARE YOU THINKING ABOUT?

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: NO, IT'S JUST... THAT BOY.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: THE BOY? WHAT ABOUT HIM?

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: I WAS WONDERING IF I WAS LIKE HIM WHEN I FIRST GOT HERE.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: NO, YOU LOOK DIFFERENT.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: IS IT ONLY GUYS' FACES THAT YOU'RE INTERESTED IN?

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: MY LADY, HE WILL CHANGE AS WELL, WON'T HE?

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: WHAT?

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: THERE ARE LOTS OF THINGS IN THE TOWER THAT HE HASN'T SEEN OR FELT BEFORE. THERE WILL BE SOME EXTRAORDINARY BEAUTY OR POWER HERE THAT WILL SEDUCE HIM EVENTUALLY. WILL HE KEEP ON FOLLOWING THAT GIRL NO MATTER WHAT? CAN SUCH UNWAVERING PASSION EXIST? I DON'T EVEN REMEMBER WHY I CAME TO THIS TOWER ANYMORE. HE'LL EVENTUALLY CHANGE TOO, WON'T HE? JUST LIKE US.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: YOU JERK! DON'T INCLUDE ME! WHAT DO YOU MEAN BY "US"?

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: OF COURSE IT'S "US"! WE'RE PARTNERS! DON'T BE SO SERIOUS. JUST FIGURE OUT WHERE HE WENT.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: IS SHE LEARNING TAEKWONDO OR SOMETHING?

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: WOULDN'T HE BE... ON EVANKHELL'S FLOOR?

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: EVANKHELL'S FLOOR? YOU MEAN THE FLOOR OF TEST?

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: YES. CHOSEN REGULARS GO THERE FIRST WHEN THEY ENTER THE TOWER. THE FLOOR OF TESTS IS WHERE CANDIDATES TEST THEIR QUALIFICATIONS TO GO UP THE TOWER.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: HEADON MIGHT HAVE SENT HIM THERE.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: HM, THE FLOOR OF TEST. IT'S A BIT DANGEROUS THERE.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: OK! THAT'S IT! ALL RIGHT! I'VE MADE MY DECISION! LET'S BREAK INTO THE FLOOR OF TEST! LET'S BRING HIM OUT AND GET BACK MY BLACK MARCH!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: NO! WE'RE NOT ALLOWED TO GO THERE!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: WHATEVER! SHOW ME THE WAY! A-RANK GUIDE!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: JEEZ... WHY CAN'T YOU FOLLOW THE RULES--

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: OH, AND EVAN... YOU HAVEN'T CHANGED AT ALL. AT LEAST, NOT SINCE THE MOMENT I MET YOU. YOU HAVEN'T EVEN GOTTEN TALLER.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: DON'T MAKE FUN OF THE INNATE FEATURES OF MY RACE!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: HAHAHA! LET'S GO, EVAN! IF HEADON'S FLOOR IS CLEAR...

summary: Bam struggles with Headon's test until Evan suggests he talk to the Black March. Bam reveals his deep desire to find his friend Rachel, which ignites the Black March's power and allows him to pass the test. Headon sends Bam up the Tower, much to Princess Yuri's frustration, who then decides to pursue him to retrieve her weapon.
